zh.lifeSummary: Mrs. Elizabeth von Schönberg於1278年出生在德國薩辛可萊斯 福波格豪森 艾爾茲格比古特 普爾陳斯坦。她於大約1298年與Siegfried von Schoenfeld在德國薩辛可萊斯 福波格瑙多福結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世在德國薩辛可萊斯 梅斯諾森，埋葬在德國薩辛可萊斯 梅斯諾森。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Mrs. Elizabeth von Schönberg于1278年出生在德国薩辛可萊斯 福波格豪森 艾爾茲格比古特 普爾陳斯坦。她于大约1298年与Siegfried von Schoenfeld在德国薩辛可萊斯 福波格瑙多福结婚。他们至少是7个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世在德国薩辛可萊斯 梅斯諾森，埋葬在德国薩辛可萊斯 梅斯諾森。

nameMeanings.name: von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Schönberg
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Scandinavian Erik, Bent.  German Ernst.

variants.name: Schoenberg
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Kurt, Dieter, Erna, Otto.  Jewish Meyer, Hyman, Mendel, Shira, Zalman.
German (Schönberg) and Jewish (Ashkenazic; Schönberg): habitational name from any of several places called Schönberg.
Jewish (Ashkenazic; Schönberg): artificial name from German schön ‘beautiful’ + Berg ‘mountain, hill’. Compare Schonberg .

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

en.lifeSummary: Mrs. Elizabeth von Schönberg was born in 1278, in Gut Purschenstein, Neuhausen Erzgebirge, Kreis Freiberg, Saxony, Germany. She married Siegfried von Schoenfeld about 1298, in Naundorf, Kreis Freiberg, Saxony, Germany. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 1 daughter. She died in Nossen, Kreis Meißen, Saxony, Germany, and was buried in Nossen, Kreis Meißen, Saxony, Germany.

fr.lifeSummary: Mrs. Elizabeth von Schönberg est née en 1278, à Gut Purschenstein, Neuhausen Erzgebirge, Kreis Freiberg, Sachsen, Allemagne. Elle a épousé Siegfried von Schoenfeld environ 1298, à Naundorf, Kreis Freiberg, Sachsen, Allemagne. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée à Nossen, Kreis Meißen, Sachsen, Allemagne, et a été enterrée à Nossen, Kreis Meißen, Sachsen, Allemagne.

de.lifeSummary: Mrs. Elizabeth von Schönberg wurde 1278 in Gut Purschenstein, Neuhausen Erzgebirge, Kreis Freiberg, Sachsen, Deutschland geboren. Sie hat um 1298 in Naundorf, Kreis Freiberg, Sachsen, Deutschland Siegfried von Schoenfeld geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 7 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb in Nossen, Kreis Meißen, Sachsen, Deutschland und wurde in Nossen, Kreis Meißen, Sachsen, Deutschland begraben.

Lei sposato Siegfried von Schoenfeld circa 1298, nel Naundorf, Kreis Freiberg, Sachsen, Germania. Erano genitori di almeno 7 figli e 1 figlia. ja.lifeSummary: Mrs. Elizabeth von Schönbergは1278年にドイツサチセンクレイス フレイバーグネウハウセン エルズジェバーッジグト プウルシェンステインで生まれた。約1298年にドイツサチセンクレイス フレイバーグナウンドルフでSiegfried von Schoenfeldと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも7人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女はドイツサチセンクレイス メイssンノセンで死去し，ドイツサチセンクレイス メイssンノセンにて埋葬された。

ko.Purschenstein, Neuhausen, Sachsen, Germa: 독일 작센 크레이스 프레이버그 니우하우센 르즈그비르지 굿 푸르슈스타인
ko.lifeSummary: Mrs. Elizabeth von Schönberg(은)는 1278년 독일 작센 크레이스 프레이버그 니우하우센 르즈그비르지 굿 푸르슈스타인에서 태어났다. 그녀는 대략 1298년 독일 작센 크레이스 프레이버그 나운도르프에서 Siegfried von Schoenfeld(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 독일 작센 크레이스 이ss 노센에서 사망했으며 독일 작센 크레이스 이ss 노센에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Mrs. Elizabeth von Schönberg nasceu em 1278, em Gut Purschenstein, Neuhausen Erzgebirge, Kreis Freiberg, Sachsen, Alemanha. Ela casou-se com Siegfried von Schoenfeld aproximadamente 1298, em Naundorf, Kreis Freiberg, Sachsen, Alemanha. Eles tiveram pelo menos 7 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em Nossen, Kreis Meißen, Sachsen, Alemanha, e foi sepultada em Nossen, Kreis Meißen, Sachsen, Alemanha.

ru.Purschenstein, Neuhausen, Sachsen, Germa: гут пурщэнстин, неухаусен эрзгебирдж, крис фрибирг, сачсен, Германия
ru.lifeSummary: Mrs. Elizabeth von Schönberg родилась в 1278 г. в местности гут пурщэнстин, неухаусен эрзгебирдж, крис фрибирг, сачсен, Германия. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Siegfried von Schoenfeld около 1298 г. в местности наундорф, крис фрибирг, сачсен, Германия. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 1 дочь. Она умерла в местности носсен, крис миssен, сачсен, Германия и была похоронена в местности носсен, крис миssен, сачсен, Германия.

Se casó con Siegfried von Schoenfeld aproximadamente 1298, en Naundorf, Kreis Freiberg, Sachsen, Alemania. Fueron padres de por lo menos 7 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en Nossen, Kreis Meißen, Sachsen, Alemania, y fue sepultada en Nossen, Kreis Meißen, Sachsen, Alemania.
